tools.name: memory_remember
tools.description: AUTONOMOUS: Store insights during work without waiting for user request. Call after discovering patterns, solving problems, or learning project specifics. Categories: proven (working solutions), anti_patterns (what failed), hypotheses (untested ideas), context (project facts), observed (behavioral patterns). Use domain for project scoping.

text.description: Memory content - be specific and actionable

category.description: Category: proven, anti_patterns, hypotheses, context, observed

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: AUTONOMOUS: Query at session start for context priming, before implementation for patterns, when stuck for prior solutions. Search by concept - semantic matching finds related memories. Results show similarity % and confidence tags. Filter by category/domain for precision.

query.description: Natural language query - semantic search finds conceptual matches

limit.description: Max results (default: 5, increase for broad queries)

category.description: Filter: proven, anti_patterns, hypotheses, context, observed

tools.name: memory_forget
tools.description: AUTONOMOUS: Delete outdated, incorrect, or superseded memories. Maintain memory quality by removing obsolete patterns, wrong assumptions, or duplicated knowledge. Call when you identify stale entries during recall.

id.description: Memory ID to delete (from recall/list results)

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: AUTONOMOUS: Browse all memories or filter by category/domain. Use for periodic review, cleanup sessions, or when exploring what's already stored. Shows confidence tags and previews for quick scanning.

category.description: Filter by category: proven, anti_patterns, hypotheses, context, observed

tools.name: memory_update
tools.description: AUTONOMOUS: Evolve memories as understanding deepens. Update text when knowledge improves, change category as hypotheses become proven, add domain tags for organization. Prefer update over delete+remember to preserve ID history.

id.description: Memory ID to update (from recall/list results)
